name: Circuit
description: Random walls of hairline traces with bright component nodes soldered in between — the board rewires itself on every redraw.

code.style: --node: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --nx: @rand(18%, 66%); --ny: @rand(18%, 66%); --rule: ( margin: -0.5px; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { border-top: 2px solid var(--color1); } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { border-left: 2px solid var(--color1); } @random(0.16) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: var(--nx); top: var(--ny); background: var(--node); transition: ease 500ms; } } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
